name: col_name_lower
description: LOWER(col_name). Sibling column for cheap case-insensitive lookups; agent contract (master M2 §9 idiom d) filters on this.

name: document_ids
description: Array of document_id values containing this column. Bounded to <=1000; if exceeded, truncated and overflow_truncated set.

name: overflow_truncated
description: TRUE when document_ids was truncated at 1000. The full list is recoverable from raw.rows via JSON_KEYS scan.
